query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A predominantly black field dotted with sparse, minute points of blue, purple, and pink light. Near the bottom right edge, a concentrated patch of mottled white and pink luminescence creates an irregular form against the dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image engulfed by extreme underexposure that renders almost the entire frame as crushed blackness. Scattered digital artifacts and colored noise speckle the void, while a smeared, detail-less cluster of white, pink, and cyan light in the lower right lacks recognizable form or texture, dissolving into mushy pixelation.
